data.title: Worktree isolation auth marker not recognized by pre-agent hook
data.description: When the sprint orchestrator writes /tmp/worktree-isolation-authorized-<uuid> with the claude process PID (49858) before dispatching a sub-agent with isolation: worktree, the pre-agent hook still blocks with 'Worktree isolation is disabled for sub-agents'. The hook uses kill -0 to verify PID liveness. Verified: kill -0 49858 returns 0 (alive) when checked via Bash tool. The auth marker file exists at dispatch time. Expected: hook allows the dispatch. Actual: hook denies regardless of marker file.
